data_description.repeat_mode: How the next due date is calculated when the task is completed.

repeat_after.title: Repeat After Completion
repeat_after.description: The task becomes due again after a fixed interval from the last completion.

data_description.task_interval_value: Time after which the task becomes due again.
data_description.task_interval_type: The unit of time for the task interval.

repeat_every.title: Repeat on a Fixed Schedule
repeat_every.description: Choose the type of schedule for this task.

data_description.repeat_every_type: The kind of recurring schedule to use.

repeat_every_weekday.title: Every N Weeks on a Weekday
repeat_every_weekday.description: The task repeats on a chosen weekday every N weeks.

data_description.repeat_weekday: The day of the week on which the task repeats.
data_description.repeat_weeks_interval: How many weeks between occurrences (1 = every week, 2 = every other week, etc.).

repeat_every_day_of_month.title: Every Nth Day of the Month
repeat_every_day_of_month.description: The task repeats on a fixed day each month.

data_description.repeat_month_day: The day of the month on which the task repeats (1–31).

repeat_every_weekday_of_month.title: Every Nth Weekday of the Month
repeat_every_weekday_of_month.description: The task repeats on a specific occurrence of a weekday each month (e.g. the 2nd Monday).

data_description.repeat_weekday: The day of the week on which the task repeats.
data_description.repeat_nth_occurrence: Which occurrence of that weekday in the month.

repeat_every_days_before_end_of_month.title: N Days Before the End of the Month
repeat_every_days_before_end_of_month.description: The task repeats a set number of days before the last day of each month.

data_description.repeat_days_before_end: How many days before the last day of the month the task is due (0 = last day, 1 = second-to-last day, etc.).

data_description.repeat_mode: How the next due date is calculated when the task is completed. 'Repeat after completion' sets the next due date relative to when the task was completed. 'Repeat every (fixed schedule)' keeps the task on its original schedule regardless of when it was completed.
data_description.notification_interval: The time in days after which notifications are sent again.
data_description.todo_lists: Todo-Lists, to which this task will be added.
data_description.due_soon_days: The number of days before the task is due to show it as due soon.
data_description.due_soon_override: Select an input_number (value in days) to override the Due soon threshold.
data_description.tags: Tags to categorize the task, separated by commas.
data_description.active_override: Select an input_boolean to override the Active setting.
